title: India [Unidentified Film]
description:
The film is shot in India in the early twentieth century (?), and displays boys performing several contortion tricks, musicians playing traditional instruments and a fakir juggling. The crowd rushes to the river of the Ganges.
				 The video is a copy from the film print held by the Museo Nazionale del Cinema: 35mm, positive, acetate, 473 m, black and white, without intertitles, silent.

title: Suicides in India
description: Across the world, India has the highest suicide rate: one out of every three suicides is committed on the subcontinent. That's according to a decade-long study recently published by the World Health Organization or WHO. The report says that some 250,000 people killed themselves in India in 2012 alone. Report: Murali Krishnan, New Delhi

The film is shot in India in the early twentieth century (?), and displays boys performing several contortion tricks, musicians playing traditional instruments and a fakir juggling. The crowd rushes to the river of the Ganges.
				 The video is a copy from the film print held by the Museo Nazionale del Cinema: 35mm, positive, acetate, 473 m, black and white, without intertitles, silent.

title: Impressions of anglo-indian society in R. Kipling's early creative art
description: This study concentrates on the analysis of early works by Rudyard Kipling who was born into the family of English colonists to India, thus becoming a representative of the newly formed Anglo-Indian society. The writer's sketch Anglo-Indian Society (1887) and his collection of short stories Plain Tales from the Hills (1888) depict the characteristic features of Anglo-Indians’ worldview and lifestyle, which are revealed and analyzed by the author of the article. Special attention is paid to biographical factors influencing the author’s choice of Anglo-Indian topic at the beginning of his writing career. The researcher concludes that Kipling presents in his works an outline of Anglo-Indian society which emerged from the writer's observations of Anglo-Indians' lives during his work as a reporter. Striving for credibility in consideration of advantages and shortcomings of Anglo-Indian worldview and lifestyle, the author tries to occupy the position of the unconcerned observer, being capable of assessing the situation with fresh mind. Kipling disguises himself under the image of the hero-narrator, being either a tourist traveler from abroad, or a reporter, accustomed to collecting factual material for the local paper, in such a way receiving an opportunity to speak ironically and sometimes even sarcastically about certain models of behavior, accepted by Anglo-Indians.

title: Înțelept indian
description: Compoziția realizată într-o manieră simbolică, are ca personaj central un bărbat drapat, văzut frontal. Este așezat pe un tron, cu picioarele încrucișate, cu coatele pe genunchi și brațele înălțate. Capul, acoperit cu o draperie, este ușor înclinat spre dreapta și privirea în jos. Personajul este înconjurat de o vegetație luxuriantă, tratată decorativ. Cromatic, albul central al draperiei personajului este accentuat de tonurile de verde ale vegetației. Fundalul, tratat decorativ este împărțit în două registre, pe orizontală. În primul plan, jos, iarba, pe care sunt plasate flori, planul doi, cu tonuri deschise pe care se reliefează arbori și păsări într-o atmosferă paradisiacă. Semnat dreapta jos cu ulei negru: Cecilia Cuțescu Storck. Nedatat.

title: Impressions of anglo-indian society in R. Kipling's early creative art
description: This study concentrates on the analysis of early works by Rudyard Kipling who was born into the family of English colonists to India, thus becoming a representative of the newly formed Anglo-Indian society. The writer's sketch Anglo-Indian Society (1887) and his collection of short stories Plain Tales from the Hills (1888) depict the characteristic features of Anglo-Indians’ worldview and lifestyle, which are revealed and analyzed by the author of the article. Special attention is paid to biographical factors influencing the author’s choice of Anglo-Indian topic at the beginning of his writing career. The researcher concludes that Kipling presents in his works an outline of Anglo-Indian society which emerged from the writer's observations of Anglo-Indians' lives during his work as a reporter. Striving for credibility in consideration of advantages and shortcomings of Anglo-Indian worldview and lifestyle, the author tries to occupy the position of the unconcerned observer, being capable of assessing the situation with fresh mind. Kipling disguises himself under the image of the hero-narrator, being either a tourist traveler from abroad, or a reporter, accustomed to collecting factual material for the local paper, in such a way receiving an opportunity to speak ironically and sometimes even sarcastically about certain models of behavior, accepted by Anglo-Indians.

title: Înțelept indian
description: Compoziția realizată într-o manieră simbolică, are ca personaj central un bărbat drapat, văzut frontal. Este așezat pe un tron, cu picioarele încrucișate, cu coatele pe genunchi și brațele înălțate. Capul, acoperit cu o draperie, este ușor înclinat spre dreapta și privirea în jos. Personajul este înconjurat de o vegetație luxuriantă, tratată decorativ. Cromatic, albul central al draperiei personajului este accentuat de tonurile de verde ale vegetației. Fundalul, tratat decorativ este împărțit în două registre, pe orizontală. În primul plan, jos, iarba, pe care sunt plasate flori, planul doi, cu tonuri deschise pe care se reliefează arbori și păsări într-o atmosferă paradisiacă. Semnat dreapta jos cu ulei negru: Cecilia Cuțescu Storck. Nedatat.

title: ISRAEL'S INDIAN RESTAURATEUR NOW LAUNCHES INDIAN FASHION.
description: Reena Pushkarna - owner of the highly successful ‘Tandoori' chain of Indian restaurants in Israel - has now released Indian-style clothing fashions onto the Israeli market. Her new fashion house is jointly-owned by Eflet Sofer. Sofer and Pushkarna - born in Bombay -- were friends as children in India. When they met again in Israel they decided to realize their shared childhood dream and create their own fashion house for clothes, jewellery, handbags and other accessories. The fashion house will open in Herzlia Pituach after the Pesah holiday. Photo shows: The photograph shows: Born in India, Rina Pushkarna owner of several Indian resaurants in Israel organaized a fashion show".

title: AN INDIAN ENTREPRENEUR ESTABLISHING
description:
Title: An Indian Entrepreneur Establishing Business in Europe

Course: Master Thesis EFO705 in International Business and Entrepreneurship,

Swedish credit points (15 ECTS)

Authors: Xiaoran Wang and Amit Vaghela

Tutor: Leif Linnskog

Problem: How did Mr. Deepak Soni establish and develop his company Anora Pvt

Ltd in Poland, a company operating in the branch of textile and clothing?

From this research problem, the dissertation will be focused on the

internationalization.

Purpose: The aim of thesis is to understand and describe the way an Indian

entrepreneur succeeded in establishing and developing a viable business in

Europe, i.e. to understand and describe how Mr. Deepak Soni established

and developed Anora Pvt Ltd in Poland, a company operating in the

branch of textile and clothing.

Method: This dissertation is based on qualitative study for the researchers to study

the internationalization process of Anora, Ltd in Europe. Qualitative study

is better for us to look into the internationalization process of Anora and

fulfill our purpose.

Theories: Uppsala-Model, Network Theory, and International Entrepreneurship build

the theoretical frame of reference.

Target Group: Our research findings will be submitted to the company Anora, Poland

and to students and researchers as we will provide important information

regarding their Internationalization Process

Conclusion: This paper has offered Anora’s empirical findings. During the analysis part,

with the help of theories we choose, we have had better understanding of

internationalization process. Moreover, we have successfully achieved the

aim to understand and describe the way an Indian entrepreneur succeeded

in establishing and developing a viable business in Europe. Moreover,

Researchers have displayed the components in the model refined,

commitment, knowledge, relationships and entrepreneurship are not

isolated, and each of them has interplayed with others. For researches in

internationalization process in future, we recommend researchers should

considerate all components as a whole rather than insularly thinking over

only one components.

description:
Eenzijdig gebatikte katoenen lap voor een sarong. De doek is afkomstig van de Coromandel-kust, Zuid-India en is ingevoerd ten tijde van de VOC.
De doek heeft een typische Indonesische indeling, zoals een 'badan' (middenstuk) en 'kepala' (hoofd) met 'tumpal' (driehoeken), maar wel Indiase motieven.

title: Stage costume  for Lo stregone per Fantasia indiana
description:
Costume da danza per il personaggio di uno stregone in Fantasia indiana di Ferruccio Busoni, balletto diretto da Aurelio Milloss nel 1971, Maggio Musicale Fiorentino. Costume di ispirazione fantastica ideato e progettato dall'artista Corrado Cagli. Il costume è impreziosito dall'applicazioni di forme geometriche di tessuti che creano una vivace gamma di colori accesi e ben definiti, tra loro armonizzati; un decoro suggestivo e funzionale ad evocare la magia del suo personaggio.

Dettagli: Panno di lana; applicazioni in feltro.

Esposizioni: Visualità del Maggio, Prato, 1979.
L’arte della Meraviglia, Filatoio di Caraglio, Caraglio (Cuneo), 2012-2013.

Bibliografia:Visualità del Maggio. Costumi e documenti 1933 – 1979 1979, p. 43. 
L’arte della Meraviglia 2012, pp. 96-97.

title: Zasoby intankowe i wydajność Porównanie przemysłu tekstowego i hiszpański Argumenta Oeconomica, 2011, No. 1 (26), p. 73-90
description: Celem tego papieru jest przetestowanie hipotezy, że istnieje pozytywne relacje między zasobami poślowymi i poziomami wydajnymi. Pomysł ten dotyczy widoku firmy. Jako empiryczny temat wybraliśmy Polish i hiszpański tekstwis i branżę odzież podczas 1998-2001 roku, contrasting przejścia i obszerzone kraje. Konkursujemy się nieparametryną techniką danych Envelopment Analiżną, wyśmiewamy się wydajności indian i Then “miarę zasobów,” konkreśliśmy się również na wpływ wieku i działalność przemysłowej. Główną wynikiem badania wspiera hipotezę tekstów i ubrań w rozwijanej kraju Hiszpanii, podczas nieznaczności okazało się nieistotne w transformalnej gospodarki Polski.

title: ISRAEL'S INDIAN RESTAURATEUR NOW LAUNCHES INDIAN FASHION.
description: Reena Pushkarna - owner of the highly successful ‘Tandoori' chain of Indian restaurants in Israel - has now released Indian-style clothing fashions onto the Israeli market. Her new fashion house is jointly-owned by Eflet Sofer. Sofer and Pushkarna - born in Bombay -- were friends as children in India. When they met again in Israel they decided to realize their shared childhood dream and create their own fashion house for clothes, jewellery, handbags and other accessories. The fashion house will open in Herzlia Pituach after the Pesah holiday. Photo shows: The photograph shows: Born in India, Rina Pushkarna owner of several Indian resaurants in Israel organaized a fashion show".

title: Arc indian Kaman
description: Tip Kaman. Format din două contracurbe în acoladă și un mâner la centru. La capete două crestături în care se fixează coarda, din cânepă și bumbac, care este prinsă prin două inele din intestin de animal. Mânerul de culoare brun închis este decorat cu motive vegetale de culoare închisă. Face parte din colecția de arme a regelui Carol I din castelul Peleș.

title: AN INDIAN ENTREPRENEUR ESTABLISHING
description:
Title: An Indian Entrepreneur Establishing Business in Europe

Course: Master Thesis EFO705 in International Business and Entrepreneurship,

Swedish credit points (15 ECTS)

Authors: Xiaoran Wang and Amit Vaghela

Tutor: Leif Linnskog

Problem: How did Mr. Deepak Soni establish and develop his company Anora Pvt

Ltd in Poland, a company operating in the branch of textile and clothing?

From this research problem, the dissertation will be focused on the

internationalization.

Purpose: The aim of thesis is to understand and describe the way an Indian

entrepreneur succeeded in establishing and developing a viable business in

Europe, i.e. to understand and describe how Mr. Deepak Soni established

and developed Anora Pvt Ltd in Poland, a company operating in the

branch of textile and clothing.

Method: This dissertation is based on qualitative study for the researchers to study

the internationalization process of Anora, Ltd in Europe. Qualitative study

is better for us to look into the internationalization process of Anora and

fulfill our purpose.

Theories: Uppsala-Model, Network Theory, and International Entrepreneurship build

the theoretical frame of reference.

Target Group: Our research findings will be submitted to the company Anora, Poland

and to students and researchers as we will provide important information

regarding their Internationalization Process

Conclusion: This paper has offered Anora’s empirical findings. During the analysis part,

with the help of theories we choose, we have had better understanding of

internationalization process. Moreover, we have successfully achieved the

aim to understand and describe the way an Indian entrepreneur succeeded

in establishing and developing a viable business in Europe. Moreover,

Researchers have displayed the components in the model refined,

commitment, knowledge, relationships and entrepreneurship are not

isolated, and each of them has interplayed with others. For researches in

internationalization process in future, we recommend researchers should

considerate all components as a whole rather than insularly thinking over

only one components.

title: Eenzijdig gebatikte Indiase katoenen doek
description:
Eenzijdig gebatikte katoenen lap voor een sarong. De doek is afkomstig van de Coromandel-kust, Zuid-India en is ingevoerd ten tijde van de VOC.
De doek heeft een typische Indonesische indeling, zoals een 'badan' (middenstuk) en 'kepala' (hoofd) met 'tumpal' (driehoeken), maar wel Indiase motieven.

title: Stage costume  for Lo stregone per Fantasia indiana
description:
Costume da danza per il personaggio di uno stregone in Fantasia indiana di Ferruccio Busoni, balletto diretto da Aurelio Milloss nel 1971, Maggio Musicale Fiorentino. Costume di ispirazione fantastica ideato e progettato dall'artista Corrado Cagli. Il costume è impreziosito dall'applicazioni di forme geometriche di tessuti che creano una vivace gamma di colori accesi e ben definiti, tra loro armonizzati; un decoro suggestivo e funzionale ad evocare la magia del suo personaggio.

Dettagli: Panno di lana; applicazioni in feltro.

Esposizioni: Visualità del Maggio, Prato, 1979.
L’arte della Meraviglia, Filatoio di Caraglio, Caraglio (Cuneo), 2012-2013.

Bibliografia:Visualità del Maggio. Costumi e documenti 1933 – 1979 1979, p. 43. 
L’arte della Meraviglia 2012, pp. 96-97.

title: Zasoby intankowe i wydajność Porównanie przemysłu tekstowego i hiszpański Argumenta Oeconomica, 2011, No. 1 (26), p. 73-90
description: Celem tego papieru jest przetestowanie hipotezy, że istnieje pozytywne relacje między zasobami poślowymi i poziomami wydajnymi. Pomysł ten dotyczy widoku firmy. Jako empiryczny temat wybraliśmy Polish i hiszpański tekstwis i branżę odzież podczas 1998-2001 roku, contrasting przejścia i obszerzone kraje. Konkursujemy się nieparametryną techniką danych Envelopment Analiżną, wyśmiewamy się wydajności indian i Then “miarę zasobów,” konkreśliśmy się również na wpływ wieku i działalność przemysłowej. Główną wynikiem badania wspiera hipotezę tekstów i ubrań w rozwijanej kraju Hiszpanii, podczas nieznaczności okazało się nieistotne w transformalnej gospodarki Polski.

When they met again in Israel they decided to realize their shared childhood dream and create their own fashion house for clothes, jewellery, handbags and other accessories. The fashion house will open in Herzlia Pituach after the Pesah holiday. Photo shows: The photograph shows: Two Israeli models wearing some of the new fashions from the Reena Pushkarna collection.

title: AN INDIAN ENTREPRENEUR ESTABLISHING
description:
Title: An Indian Entrepreneur Establishing Business in Europe

Course: Master Thesis EFO705 in International Business and Entrepreneurship,

Swedish credit points (15 ECTS)

Authors: Xiaoran Wang and Amit Vaghela

Tutor: Leif Linnskog

Problem: How did Mr. Deepak Soni establish and develop his company Anora Pvt

Ltd in Poland, a company operating in the branch of textile and clothing?

From this research problem, the dissertation will be focused on the

internationalization.

Purpose: The aim of thesis is to understand and describe the way an Indian

entrepreneur succeeded in establishing and developing a viable business in

Europe, i.e. to understand and describe how Mr. Deepak Soni established

and developed Anora Pvt Ltd in Poland, a company operating in the

branch of textile and clothing.

Method: This dissertation is based on qualitative study for the researchers to study

the internationalization process of Anora, Ltd in Europe. Qualitative study

is better for us to look into the internationalization process of Anora and

fulfill our purpose.

Theories: Uppsala-Model, Network Theory, and International Entrepreneurship build

the theoretical frame of reference.

Target Group: Our research findings will be submitted to the company Anora, Poland

and to students and researchers as we will provide important information

regarding their Internationalization Process

Conclusion: This paper has offered Anora’s empirical findings. During the analysis part,

with the help of theories we choose, we have had better understanding of

internationalization process. Moreover, we have successfully achieved the

aim to understand and describe the way an Indian entrepreneur succeeded

in establishing and developing a viable business in Europe. Moreover,

Researchers have displayed the components in the model refined,

commitment, knowledge, relationships and entrepreneurship are not

isolated, and each of them has interplayed with others. For researches in

internationalization process in future, we recommend researchers should

considerate all components as a whole rather than insularly thinking over

only one components.

title: Stage costume  for Lo stregone per Fantasia indiana
description:
Costume da danza per il personaggio di uno stregone in Fantasia indiana di Ferruccio Busoni, balletto diretto da Aurelio Milloss nel 1971, Maggio Musicale Fiorentino. Costume di ispirazione fantastica ideato e progettato dall'artista Corrado Cagli. Il costume è impreziosito dall'applicazioni di forme geometriche di tessuti che creano una vivace gamma di colori accesi e ben definiti, tra loro armonizzati; un decoro suggestivo e funzionale ad evocare la magia del suo personaggio.

Dettagli: Panno di lana; applicazioni in feltro.

Esposizioni: Visualità del Maggio, Prato, 1979.
L’arte della Meraviglia, Filatoio di Caraglio, Caraglio (Cuneo), 2012-2013.

Bibliografia:Visualità del Maggio. Costumi e documenti 1933 – 1979 1979, p. 43. 
L’arte della Meraviglia 2012, pp. 96-97.

title: Zasoby intankowe i wydajność Porównanie przemysłu tekstowego i hiszpański Argumenta Oeconomica, 2011, No. 1 (26), p. 73-90
description: Celem tego papieru jest przetestowanie hipotezy, że istnieje pozytywne relacje między zasobami poślowymi i poziomami wydajnymi. Pomysł ten dotyczy widoku firmy. Jako empiryczny temat wybraliśmy Polish i hiszpański tekstwis i branżę odzież podczas 1998-2001 roku, contrasting przejścia i obszerzone kraje. Konkursujemy się nieparametryną techniką danych Envelopment Analiżną, wyśmiewamy się wydajności indian i Then “miarę zasobów,” konkreśliśmy się również na wpływ wieku i działalność przemysłowej. Główną wynikiem badania wspiera hipotezę tekstów i ubrań w rozwijanej kraju Hiszpanii, podczas nieznaczności okazało się nieistotne w transformalnej gospodarki Polski.

title: ISRAEL'S INDIAN RESTAURATEUR NOW LAUNCHES INDIAN FASHION.
description: Reena Pushkarna - owner of the highly successful ‘Tandoori' chain of Indian restaurants in Israel - has now released Indian-style clothing fashions onto the Israeli market. Her new fashion house is jointly-owned by Eflet Sofer. Sofer and Pushkarna - born in Bombay -- were friends as children in India. When they met again in Israel they decided to realize their shared childhood dream and create their own fashion house for clothes, jewellery, handbags and other accessories. The fashion house will open in Herzlia Pituach after the Pesah holiday. Photo shows: The photograph shows: Born in India, Rina Pushkarna owner of several Indian resaurants in Israel organaized a fashion show".

La capete două crestături în care se fixează coarda, din cânepă și bumbac, care este prinsă prin două inele din intestin de animal. Mânerul de culoare brun închis este decorat cu motive vegetale de culoare închisă. Face parte din colecția de arme a regelui Carol I din castelul Peleș.

title: AN INDIAN ENTREPRENEUR ESTABLISHING
description:
Title: An Indian Entrepreneur Establishing Business in Europe

Course: Master Thesis EFO705 in International Business and Entrepreneurship,

Swedish credit points (15 ECTS)

Authors: Xiaoran Wang and Amit Vaghela

Tutor: Leif Linnskog

Problem: How did Mr. Deepak Soni establish and develop his company Anora Pvt

Ltd in Poland, a company operating in the branch of textile and clothing?

From this research problem, the dissertation will be focused on the

internationalization.

Purpose: The aim of thesis is to understand and describe the way an Indian

entrepreneur succeeded in establishing and developing a viable business in

Europe, i.e. to understand and describe how Mr. Deepak Soni established

and developed Anora Pvt Ltd in Poland, a company operating in the

branch of textile and clothing.

Method: This dissertation is based on qualitative study for the researchers to study

the internationalization process of Anora, Ltd in Europe. Qualitative study

is better for us to look into the internationalization process of Anora and

fulfill our purpose.

Theories: Uppsala-Model, Network Theory, and International Entrepreneurship build

the theoretical frame of reference.

Target Group: Our research findings will be submitted to the company Anora, Poland

and to students and researchers as we will provide important information

regarding their Internationalization Process

Conclusion: This paper has offered Anora’s empirical findings. During the analysis part,

with the help of theories we choose, we have had better understanding of

internationalization process. Moreover, we have successfully achieved the

aim to understand and describe the way an Indian entrepreneur succeeded

in establishing and developing a viable business in Europe. Moreover,

Researchers have displayed the components in the model refined,

commitment, knowledge, relationships and entrepreneurship are not

isolated, and each of them has interplayed with others. For researches in

internationalization process in future, we recommend researchers should

considerate all components as a whole rather than insularly thinking over

only one components.

title: legging, leggings [[Textil]]
description: Tillhör Cronholms Hurondräkt med rock, skjorta, mockasiner, bälte, knytband m.m. Benkläde av rött kläde (tuskaftvävt och valkat ylle) dekorerat med svarta sammetsband med olikfärgade blombroderier av trädpiggsvinstaggar (enl. katalog). Banden är kantade med ljusblått sidenband. Klädets stadkant längs överkanten. Fransar av ljust sämskat skinn i ytterkanter av klädets nederdel samt två fästband med knapphål i överkant av samma kvalité skinn. Knytband 1936.22.15.O tillhör benkläderna. [[Textil]]

title: Kuna Yala - Textile Molas zeigen Tiere oder indianische Motive

title: Eenzijdig gebatikte Indiase katoenen doek
description:
Eenzijdig gebatikte katoenen lap voor een sarong. De doek is afkomstig van de Coromandel-kust, Zuid-India en is ingevoerd ten tijde van de VOC.
De doek heeft een typische Indonesische indeling, zoals een 'badan' (middenstuk) en 'kepala' (hoofd) met 'tumpal' (driehoeken), maar wel Indiase motieven.
